_comment: Verified procedures — canonical causal knowledge with episode provenance. Promoted deliberately from episode-log evidence (see evidence/trials.jsonl and evidence_miner.py), never from free-form LLM prose. Injected into reasoner/agent/walkthrough prompts as ground truth.

procedures.name: Open dam sluice gates (drain the reservoir)
preconditions: wrench in inventory (wrench is at the Dam's Maintenance Room area)
yellow button pressed THIS episode (green bubble on the dam panel glows)
postconditions: sluice gates open; reservoir drains over the next several turns
trunk of jewels becomes reachable at Reservoir (L100)
failure_modes: 'turn bolt with wrench' ALWAYS fails unless the yellow button was pressed first this episode — do NOT blind-retry the bolt; go press yellow at Maintenance Room (L199)
evidence: Ep46 T63 yellow, T66 bolt ok
Ep50 T93 bolt fail, T111 yellow, T114 bolt ok
Ep53 T68 bolt fail, T73 yellow, T76 bolt ok
Ep59 T95 bolt fail, T106 yellow, T109 bolt ok
Ep61 T69 bolt fail, T72 yellow, T75 bolt ok
Ep62 T211/213/217 bolt fail, T224 yellow, T227 bolt ok
